headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the 'Generated Evaluations without Ground Truth' design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so metrics are available for your next reporting cycle
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); without them you're blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, it's in To Do with no due date, and evals are a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Agents Big Rock OKR page. Zero-meeting day is ideal for deep work.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and open questions for the no-ground-truth evaluations design doc (AE-1079) before drafting further
Salesforce auth failure (INVALID_LOGIN) and Snowflake empty-password error — request credential reset

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility on customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake metrics pipeline is broken (empty password) — no telemetry data for MBR dashboard or OKR tracking.
AE-1079 has no due date set; consider adding one aligned to the next bi-weekly TR (likely ~2026-04-28) to create accountability.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in OKRs — monitor for any escalations that could land on your plate.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce, Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the primary adoption-driving work item today.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday: no meetings, no emails, no Slack escalations. Top priority is deep work on AE-1079 (generated evaluations without ground truth design doc) — reach out to Jordan to align on scope. Also need to get Salesforce and Snowflake credentials fixed ASAP since both integrations are broken and you're flying blind on metrics and escalations. Zero meetings today.
